name: EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitSLd

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT A.BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, A.MBR_ID, A.CONSIS_MBR_ID, A.TRACEABILITY_FLD, A.MBR_DOB, A.MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, A.MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, A.MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, A.MBR_GNDR, A.MBR_CONFITY_CD, A.ACCT, A.GRP_ID, A.SUBGRP_ID, A.COV_BEG_DT, A.COV_END_DT, A.MBR_RELSHP, A.HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, A.SUB_ID, A.ENR_ELIG_STTUS, A.MBR_MED_COB_CD, A.MBR_PDX_COB_CD, A.DEDCT_CAT, A.MHCD_ENR_BNF, A.PDX_BNF_IN, A.MHCD_BNF_IN, A.MED_BNF_IN, A.HOSP_BNF_IN, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, A.PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, A.PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, A.PDX_BNF_TIERS, A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, A.PROD_SK, A.PROD_SH_NM, B.MID_EFF_DT_SK, B.MID_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_ENR AS A JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT AS B ON A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MBR_EFF_DT_SK = B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK AND A.MBR_TERM_DT_SK = B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK WHERE B.MID_EFF_DT_SK <> 'NULL'), cte2 AS (SELECT cte1.*, CASE WHEN MID_EFF_DT_SK IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS svMidEff FROM cte1), final AS (SELECT BHI_HOME_PLN_ID, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID, MBR_ID, CONSIS_MBR_ID, TRACEABILITY_FLD, MBR_DOB, MBR_CUR_PRI_ZIP_CD, MBR_S_CUR_CTRY, MBR_S_CUR_CNTY, MBR_GNDR, MBR_CONFITY_CD, ACCT, GRP_ID, SUBGRP_ID, CASE WHEN svMidEff='Y' THEN dbo.trim_custom(MID_EFF_DT_SK,'-','A') ELSE COV_BEG_DT END AS COV_BEG_DT, CASE WHEN svMidEff='Y' THEN dbo.trim_custom(MID_TERM_DT_SK,'-','A') ELSE COV_END_DT END AS COV_END_DT, MBR_RELSHP, HOME_PLN_PROD_ID_SUB, SUB_ID, ENR_ELIG_STTUS, CASE WHEN svMidEff='Y' THEN 'S' ELSE MBR_MED_COB_CD END AS MBR_MED_COB_CD, CASE WHEN svMidEff='Y' THEN 'S' ELSE MBR_PDX_COB_CD END AS MBR_PDX_COB_CD, DEDCT_CAT, MHCD_ENR_BNF, PDX_BNF_IN, MHCD_BNF_IN, MED_BNF_IN, HOSP_BNF_IN, BHI_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, BHI_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PLN_NTWK_CAT_FCLTY, PLN_NTWK_CAT_PROF, PDX_CARVE_OUT_SUBMSN_IN, PDX_BNF_TIERS, MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CASE WHEN svMidEff='Y' THEN MID_EFF_DT_SK ELSE MBR_EFF_DT_SK END AS MBR_EFF_DT_SK, CASE WHEN svMidEff='Y' THEN MID_TERM_DT_SK ELSE MBR_TERM_DT_SK END AS MBR_TERM_DT_SK, PROD_SK, PROD_SH_NM FROM cte2) SELECT * FROM final

JOB NAME:  EdwBhiMbrCobBaseSplitSLd


DESCRIPTION:  Inner join and load base split table for Cob type cd = COM


CALLED BY:

Annotations:
Inner Join W_BHI_MBR_ENR to W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT to load W_BHI_MBR_ENR_SPLT and Assign 'S' to MBR_MED_COB_CD and MBR_PDX_COB_CD
